title: Glowing Minerals
description:
Gives glowing to minerals.

I re-uploaded RP as I switched to the account system by Modrinth.
body:
Gives glowing to minerals, such as: diamond, quartz, redstone, lapis, emerald. 
For the resource pack to work, you will need Optifine or Continuity.

I re-uploaded RP as I switched to the account system by Modrinth.
